title: Dangerous Plants
description: Adds a few plants that dangerous to eat or step on
body:
# Adds plants that are dangerous to eat or step on

The mod currently has 2 plants:

- The Bush of Booms that drops Boom Berries, It gives a lot of hunger but also has a chance to explode when eaten

- The Explosive Berries Bush that will explode when stepped on, gathering it gives Explosive Berries that can be thrown to destroy blocks faster

![bushes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b949b0e7af909e43d7ccb88a717f24bcac5b860.png)
